candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; appears twice but with same label, representing top-line sales.

variables.notes: Selected the main operating revenue line as top-line sales. Duplicate labels are identical so only one entry is needed.

candidates.why: Represents the main operating cost line associated with generating revenue; among candidates, this is the closest proxy for cost of sales.

variables.notes: No explicit cost of goods sold line; using the primary 'Operating Expense' line as the best available proxy within the provided candidates.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A line item representing overhead costs.
Operating overhead-type expenses that are not COGS; treated as part of SG&A components.
Similar overhead operating expenses likely included in SG&A.

variables.notes: Used explicit SG&A line plus related operating expense components, excluding any totals or balancing items.

candidates.why: Only explicit R&D-related expense line; represents R&D costs that are capitalized but still the closest match for R&D expense.

variables.notes: No separate R&D expensed line is present; using the capitalized R&D line as the R&D proxy per candidates.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line within finance costs with actual negative amounts; best representation of interest expense.
Explicit interest expense label, likely supplemental; used as secondary fallback per priority rule.

variables.notes: Provided a priority list for interest expense: main reported 'Interest cost' first, then supplemental 'Interest Expense' as fallback.

candidates.why: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent, excluding non-controlling interest, which is reported separately.

variables.notes: Chose parent shareholders’ equity rather than Total Equity to avoid double-counting non-controlling interests.

candidates.why: Balance sheet line for equity attributable to non-controlling interests; primary source for MIB.
Alternative label for the same non-controlling interests; used as a secondary fallback in priority list.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet non-controlling interest lines (level values) as MIB; income statement minority interest lines are flows and not used here.
